Santhera's AGAMREE (Vamorolone) approved by NICE for Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy treatment. Positive recommendation.
news.summary: Santhera has recently received a favorable recommendation from NICE for their drug AGAMREE® (Vamorolone) in the treatment of Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy. This recommendation signifies a significant step forward in the approval process for the drug, which has shown promise in clinical trials. Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy affects approximately 1 in every 3,500 to 5,000 male births, making it a rare and serious genetic disorder. The positive recommendation from NICE highlights the potential impact AGAMREE® could have in improving the lives of those affected by this debilitating condition.

news.headline: Vivoryon Therapeutics N.V. announces Q3 2024 results and updates on Varoglutamstat for kidney disease.
news.summary: In their latest report, Vivoryon Therapeutics N.V. disclosed their Q3 2024 results, showcasing notable advancements in Varoglutamstat for the treatment of kidney disease. The company revealed key highlights indicating significant progress in their research and development efforts. This update signifies a crucial step forward in their pursuit of innovative therapies.

news.headline: Royal Vopak completes EUR 300 million share buyback program, repurchasing 7,924,438 shares at average price of EUR 37.86 each.
news.summary: Royal Vopak, based in Rotterdam, the Netherlands, has successfully completed its share buyback program, returning EUR 300 million to shareholders. The company repurchased 7,924,438 ordinary shares, equal to 6.30% of its outstanding shares, at an average price of EUR 37.86 per share between February 14, 2024, and December 9, 2024. Post-cancellation, total issued outstanding shares will be 117,816,148. Vopak, operational for over 400 years, offers storage and infrastructure solutions globally for vital products like energy sources, chemicals, and edible oils. They are now prioritizing safety, reliability, and efficiency, aiming to support the energy transition by developing infrastructure solutions for hydrogen, ammonia, CO₂, long-duration energy storage, and low-carbon fuels & feedstocks. For additional details on the buyback program, visit vopak.com/investors/share-buyback-program-2024. For more information, Vopak can be reached at global.communication@vopak.com for press inquiries and investor.relations@vopak.com for analysts and investors.

news.headline: Kitron is focused on driving growth and profits in 2025 and beyond, updating investors on financial and commercial targets in a Capital Markets Presentation today.
news.summary: Today, Kitron is conducting a Capital Markets Presentation to provide investors with an update on the company's financial and commercial goals for the future.

news.headline: Melexis initiates buy-back program.

Roche's Columvi and Lunsumio data at ASH 2024 show potential to improve lymphoma outcomes, with 20+ abstracts presented. Chief Medical Officer highlights lasting remissions for people with advanced lymphoma. #Roche #lymphoma #ASH2024
news.summary: Roche announced new data from its CD20xCD3 T-cell-engaging bispecific antibody programme at the 66th ASH Annual Meeting, showcasing benefits of fixed-duration Columvi® and Lunsumio® across various lymphomas. More than 20 bispecific antibody abstracts were presented, highlighting lasting remissions in patients with advanced lymphoma. Roche aims to innovate treatment standards at earlier disease stages, offering innovative therapeutic options. Levi Garraway, Roche’s CMO, emphasized the potential of Columvi and Lunsumio in transforming treatment for B-cell malignancies.

Dassault Systèmes partners with UniLaSalle to launch 3DEXPERIENCE Edu Center of Excellence, making UniLaSalle the 25th member.
news.summary: VELIZY-VILLACOUBLAY, France & BEAUVAIS, France--Dassault Systèmes and UniLaSalle, a French engineering university specializing in life, digital, energy, and veterinary sciences, have revealed that UniLaSalle is now the 25th member of the global 3DEXPERIENCE Edu Center of Excellence program. This initiative, in partnership with Dassault Systèmes, aims to offer experiential learning using the 3DEXPERIENCE platform to drive the digital evolution of industries worldwide.

Tim Cox appointed VP of Customer Delivery Group at Sycurio, enhancing customers' experiences with payment solutions.
news.summary: Cox is set to enhance customer satisfaction through innovative payment solutions from Sycurio in GUILDFORD, United Kingdom and BOSTON. On December 10, 2024, Sycurio announced its expertise in providing secure multi-channel payment experiences for contact centers will now benefit Cox customers. This move aims to elevate customer experiences by offering cutting-edge payment solutions.

news.headline: Crypto market pullbacks to be 'buy the dip' opportunities for an extended period: Syncracy Capital co-founder Daniel Cheung.
news.summary: According to Daniel Cheung, co-founder of Syncracy Capital, the recent declines in the cryptocurrency market present a buying opportunity that will last longer than anticipated. Cheung believes that investors should consider purchasing during these dips, indicating a favorable market trend.

This announcement was made by the Company known as Riot, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol RIOT. The notes are set to be traded in...

news.headline: CAMP will open registration in January for its 2025 summer camp, offering safe recreational experiences for ages 5-55 with disabilities.
news.summary: For over four decades, the Children's Association for Maximum Potential (CAMP) has been offering secure and enjoyable recreational opportunities for people ranging from ages 5 to 55. These individuals have various diagnoses including Autism Spectrum Disorder, Intellectual Disability, Cerebral Palsy, Traumatic Brain Injury, and Spina.

news.headline: Mission named AWS Security Partner of the Year, recognized in 5 global categories. LOS ANGELES, Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: Mission, a CDW company based in the US, has been distinguished as the Security Partner of the Year and made it as a finalist in four international categories, showcasing their extensive knowledge in cloud and AI technologies. This recognition was awarded in Los Angeles on December 9, 2024.Mission is an AWS Premier Tier Services and ISV, emphasizing their expertise in this field.

news.headline: New study affirms low-level laser therapy aids FET success for women with implantation issues. Acubalance Wellness Centre leads in integrative fertility care.
news.summary: The Acubalance Wellness Centre, known for its expertise in integrative fertility care, is commemorating a recent study that validates the efficacy of low-level laser therapy (LLLT) in enhancing frozen embryo transfer (FET) results for women experiencing recurrent implantation failure. This research affirms Acubalance's commitment to leveraging innovative methods to improve outcomes in fertility treatment.

news.headline: Eric Haun appointed as Executive Editor of WorkBoat, a leading media brand for commercial marine industries.
news.summary: Eric Haun has been appointed as the new Executive Editor of WorkBoat, a prominent maritime publication, aiming to steer editorial strategy and improve industry reporting. The announcement was made on December 9, 2024 in Portland, Maine. Haun, a seasoned maritime journalist, is expected to bring valuable insight and expertise to the publication. WorkBoat is recognized as a top media platform for the commercial marine sector.

news.headline: North Square Investments named one of the "Best Places to Work in Money Management" for 2024 by Pensions & Investments.
news.summary: North Square Investments (North Square) has been acknowledged in the 2024 Best Places to Work in Money Management awards revealed by Pensions & Investments today. The award was announced in CHICAGO on December 9, 2024. This recognition highlights North Square's commitment to creating a positive work environment.

news.headline: Jack Gearan of Greenberg Traurig spoke at Entrepreneurs' Organization Boston Power Lunch on Employment Law on Nov. 20.
news.summary: On November 20, 2024, Jack S. Gearan, a shareholder in the Labor & Employment Practice of the global law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP, participated as a speaker at the "Workplace Wisdom: Employment Law" Power Lunch organized by Entrepreneurs' Organization Boston (EO Boston). The event took place in Boston, and this news was released on December 9, 2024. The event aimed to provide insights and knowledge on employment law to the attendees. Jack S. Gearan's involvement in this event highlights his expertise in this area.

news.headline: Ziegler advises on sale of St. Mary of The Woods, a 179-bed nursing home in Avon, Ohio for Atrium Centers.
news.summary: Ziegler, a niche investment bank, has revealed its involvement as the sole sell-side financial advisor in the sale of St. Mary of the Woods, a continuing care retirement community with 179 beds/units situated in Avon, Ohio (referred to as "SMOW" or the "Community"), on behalf of Atrium Centers. The transaction took place in Chicago.

news.headline: Quinism Foundation urges VA to screen vets for toxic mefloquine exposure under PACT Act. Important: Section 603 mandates screening, but current tools ignore mefloquine neurotoxicity.
news.summary: A specific section (603) of the PACT Act requires toxic exposure screening, but the current tools used by the VA do not include an assessment for Mefloquine neurotoxicity. The Quinism Foundation, based in Port Huron, Michigan, issued a statement on December 9, 2024, urging the VA to conduct screenings for recent veterans to identify any instances of this neurotoxicity.

news.headline: Smith was recognized as Featured International Branded Distributor at EE Awards 2024 in Taipei for its innovation and customer satisfaction.
news.summary: Today, Smith, a prominent distributor of electronic components and semiconductors worldwide, was honored as the Featured International Branded Distributor in the Featured Electronic Components Distributor category at the EE Awards Asia 2024 held in Taipei, Taiwan. This marks the third time Smith has received this prestigious recognition.

news.headline: Discovery Channel to feature FRVA convention in March 2025. Hosted by RV series hosts in Perry, Georgia. CINCINNATI, Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: The hosts of the popular cable TV show "RV There Yet?" will be present at the upcoming Family RV Association convention in Perry, Georgia. Taking place in December 2024, the event aims to provide attendees with a comprehensive experience and give viewers a detailed insight into FRVA's activities. The partnership between FRVA and Kevin will bring a unique perspective to the convention, enhancing the overall experience for participants. This collaboration is set to attract a significant number of RV enthusiasts and industry professionals, making it a must-attend event for anyone interested in the RV lifestyle.

news.headline: Venetoclax could enhance CAR T outcomes for DLBCL patients. 1/3 face disease progression. Research by Roswell Park presented at ASH.
news.summary: Approximately 33% of patients diagnosed with diffuse large B cell lymphoma (DLBCL), a rapidly progressing type of lymphoma, will experience disease progression or recurrence after undergoing treatment. In an effort to improve the outcomes of current DLBCL therapies, a team at Roswell Park is exploring a novel treatment approach.

news.headline: Microsoft introduces water-saving data centers: "Closed loop" design saves 125 million liters/year per facility.
news.summary: Microsoft has unveiled a new closed-loop water recycling design for data centers that would result in saving 125 million liters of water per facility each year.

news.headline: Himax and Liqxtal Technology reveal innovative liquid crystal optical technologies at CES 2025, impacting vision care and smart eyewear.
news.summary: Recent advancements in liquid crystal technologies have been instrumental in driving innovations in both vision care and smart eyewear. The latest breakthroughs in this field have paved the way for significant improvements in eye health and wearable tech. These cutting-edge liquid crystal technologies have resulted in a reduction of X% in eye strain among users of smart eyewear, as well as a Y% increase in visual acuity for individuals utilizing vision care solutions. This rapid progress highlights the potential for further developments in the integration of liquid crystals in enhancing both vision-related devices and wearable technology.

news.headline: Galxe announces $50M ecosystem fund & upgrade to Gravity EVM for project support on its network.
news.summary: Galxe, a platform focused on Web3 identity and rewards, has recently introduced an enhanced EVM upgrade. Alongside this development, they have allocated a substantial $50 million ecosystem fund to bolster and nurture projects that are developing on their network.

news.headline: U.S. stock futures slightly lower on Tuesday. UNFI expected to report earnings of $4.33 per share on revenue of $3.17B. Toll Brothers beat Q4 earnings expectations.
news.summary: US stock futures are slightly lower on Tuesday, drawing attention towards certain stocks. United Natural Foods Inc. (NYSE: UNFI) is anticipated to announce quarterly earnings of $4.33 per share with revenue reaching $3.17 billion. The stock surged 2.7% to $25.34 in after-hours trading. Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE: TOL) recently reported fourth-quarter earnings that exceeded expectations. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: S&P 500, Nasdaq drop from highs due to Nvidia decline over Chinese antitrust concerns; Fear & Greed index stays 'Neutral'. S&P 500 gained 0.96%, Nasdaq 3.34% but Dow lost 0.6% last week. Nvidia shares lost 2.6% as Chinese regulator probes antitrust breach. AMD shares dipped 5.6%.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a decrease in market sentiment, staying within the "Neutral" zone on Monday. U.S. stocks closed lower, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite pulling back from their peak levels due to a drop in tech stocks. Over the past week, the S&P 500 rose by 0.96% and Nasdaq by 3.34%, marking gains for the third consecutive week; in contrast, the Dow experienced a 0.6% decline. Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) shares fell approximately 2.6% as a Chinese regulatory body launched an investigation into potential antitrust violations. Shares of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) decreased by about 5.6%. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

Matador Technologies Inc. completes Qualifying Transaction with Matador Gold Technologies Inc. on Dec.10, 2024.
news.summary: Toronto, 10th December 2024 - Matador Technologies Inc., previously known as Scaling Capital 1 Corp., has successfully completed its Qualifying Transaction in accordance with the TSX Venture Exchange guidelines. The transaction, completed through a reverse takeover as part of a court-approved plan of arrangement under Section 182 of the Business Corporations Act (Ontario), involved Matador Technologies Inc. and Matador Gold Technologies Inc. The merger agreement, dated 16th October 2024, outlined the terms and conditions of the deal. Matador Technologies Inc. is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol SKAL.P.

news.summary: The latest data shows that the number of COVID-19 cases has reached new highs, with over 1.5 million confirmed cases worldwide. In the United States alone, the number of cases has surpassed 500,000, making it the country with the highest number of confirmed cases. The global death toll has also risen to over 90,000, with Italy and Spain being the most affected countries in terms of fatalities. The rapid spread of the virus has led to strict lockdown measures being implemented in many countries in an effort to contain its transmission. Officials continue to urge the public to practice social distancing and follow hygiene guidelines to help slow the spread of the virus.

news.headline: AutoZone to announce Q1 results with $33.64 earnings per share and $4.31 billion revenue; shares close at $3,324.01.
news.summary: AutoZone, Inc. will be sharing its first-quarter results on Tuesday, December 10. Analysts predict earnings of $33.64 per share, an increase from $32.55 per share a year ago. The revenue forecast for the quarter stands at $4.31 billion, up from $4.19 billion from the previous year. In the fourth quarter report on Sept. 24, AutoZone posted earnings per share of $51.58, falling short of the expected $53.53. Closing at $3,324.01 on Monday, AutoZone shares saw a 0.4% increase. For the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where they can organize data by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, and rating changes.

Hebei's Zhangbei offers world's largest green energy chain, supplying continuous green energy worldwide.
news.summary: In Shijiazhuang, China, on December 10, 2024, a report from Great Wall New Media highlighted China's significant achievements in the green energy sector. This accomplishment ensures a steady and abundant global supply of green energy. Notably, Zhangbei is at the forefront of these advancements.
